backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point for the Internet Computer canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting 7 implemented features (splash screen, dashboard, crop schedule, fertilizer calculator, pest/disease management, weather advisory, market prices, government schemes) with file mappings, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, data files, utilities, and configuration, describing their purpose and implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and CSS custom properties defining light/dark theme color schemes using OKLCH color space for agricultural UI design.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with PWA meta tags, manifest link, theme color, icons, and script tag loading the React application.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest defining app name, icons, display mode (standalone), orientation (portrait), theme colors, and categories for installable web app functionality.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing cache-first strategy for offline functionality, caching static assets and data files on install, and serving cached content when offline.
frontend/README.md: Project documentation describing the Smart Farmer Guide PWA features, technology stack (React, Motoko, Tailwind), design philosophy (mobile-first, offline-capable), and setup instructions.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component managing splash screen state (2-second timer) and configuring TanStack Router with 7 routes (dashboard, crop schedule, fertilizer, pest/disease, weather, market prices, schemes).
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper component with sticky header (back button or logo), main content area with Outlet for nested routes, and footer with attribution link.
frontend/src/components/SplashScreen.tsx: Splash screen component displaying app logo and name with gradient background and fade-in animation, shown for 2 seconds on app launch.
frontend/src/constants/strings.ts: Centralized English language strings for all UI text in the Smart Farmer Guide app, organized by screen/feature with instructions for adding Hindi and Marathi translations.
frontend/src/data/cropSchedules.ts: Defines crop schedule data for cotton, soybean, wheat, and rice, including stages (sowing, fertilizer application, irrigation, harvest) with timing and detailed descriptions for each stage.
frontend/src/data/governmentSchemes.ts: Contains data for four Indian government agricultural schemes (PMFBY, Soil Health Card, PM-KISAN, KCC) with eligibility criteria and benefits information.
frontend/src/data/marketPrices.ts: Static market price data for 12 common crops in Indian Rupees per quintal, with instructions for updating prices.
frontend/src/data/pestDiseaseData.ts: Pest and disease information for four crop types, including symptoms, control methods, and chemical treatment recommendations with dosages for each pest/disease.
frontend/src/data/weatherAdvisories.ts: Weather-based farming advisories for three conditions (sunny, cloudy, rainy), providing actionable recommendations for irrigation, spraying, harvesting, and field operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom agricultural-themed color system using OKLCH color space, including earth tones, dark mode support, typography styles, and touch-friendly utilities for rural users.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/CropSchedule.tsx: Displays crop cultivation schedules with a dropdown to select crop type (cotton, soybean, wheat, rice) and shows stage-by-stage farming instructions with timing and descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a grid of six feature cards (crop schedule, fertilizer calculator, pest/disease, weather, market prices, government schemes) with icons and navigation.
Interactive calculator that takes crop type and land area as inputs and displays recommended fertilizer quantities (NPK) with application instructions and estimated costs.
frontend/src/pages/GovernmentSchemes.tsx: Lists government agricultural schemes with details about eligibility criteria and benefits for farmers in card format.
frontend/src/pages/MarketPrices.tsx: Displays current market prices for various crops in a table format showing crop names and prices per quintal in Indian Rupees.
frontend/src/pages/PestDisease.tsx: Shows pest and disease information for selected crops with images, symptoms, control methods, and recommended chemical treatments in detailed cards.
frontend/src/pages/WeatherAdvisory.tsx: Provides weather-based farming advisories where users select current weather conditions (sunny, cloudy, rainy) to receive relevant agricultural recommendations.
frontend/src/serviceWorker.ts: Empty service worker file, likely placeholder for PWA offline functionality.
Exports a function that calculates fertilizer requirements (Urea, DAP, Potash) for four crop types (cotton, soybean, wheat, rice) based on land area in acres, using base requirements per acre scaled to the input area.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom earth-tone colors, large touch-friendly font sizes (base 18px), extended spacing for mobile interaction, and custom animations for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing Smart Farmer Guide as a mobile-first PWA for Indian farmers with crop schedules, fertilizer calculator, pest management, weather, market prices, and government schemes features, noting a platform mismatch issue (React web app vs requested Flutter/Android app).
